impact: This resumes the fixture-only DevHub form-state contract work after the daemon guardrail task passed, while staying deterministic and avoiding Playwright runtime automation or private DevHub state.
summary: Add a synthetic DevHub draft-page form-state fixture and a narrow unittest validator for accessible selector shape, labels, roles, required flags, redacted values, and no browser/runtime artifacts.
target_task: Task checkbox-72: Task checkbox-67: Resume checkbox-62 only after checkbox-66 passes. Use one syntax-valid Python unittest file, or one small redacted fixture plus one unittest file, that validates the committed or synthetic DevHub draft-page form-state fixture shape with accessible selectors, labels, roles, required flags, redacted values, and no browser launch. Do not add Playwright runtime automation, private auth state, screenshots, traces, uploads, submissions, payments, MFA, CAPTCHA, cancellation, certification, or inspection scheduling.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
